footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyền %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong khai báo quyền duyệt.' else N'The approval roles %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyền %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the approval roles %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyền %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the approval roles %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyền %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The approval roles %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ((ma_quyen like rtrim(@ma_quyen) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_quyen) like rtrim(ma_quyen) + '%')) begin select 'ma_quyen' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_quyen)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID update @dmquyenct set ma_quyen = @ma_quyen, loai_duyet = @loai_duyet

if not exists(select * from @@table where loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and ma_quyen = $ma_quyen.OldValue) begin select 'ma_quyen' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_quyen.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_quyen <> $ma_quyen.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ((ma_quyen like rtrim(@ma_quyen) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_quyen) like rtrim(ma_quyen) + '%') and not(loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and ma_quyen = $ma_quyen.OldValue)) begin select 'ma_quyen' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_quyen)) as message return end
if $dmquyenct.NewValue = $dmquyenct.OldValue begin update dmquyenct set ma_quyen = @ma_quyen where loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and ma_quyen = $ma_quyen.OldValue end end
if $dmquyenct.NewValue <> $dmquyenct.OldValue begin update @dmquyenct set ma_quyen = @ma_quyen, loai_duyet = @loai_duyet delete dmquyenct where ma_quyen = @ma_quyen and loai_duyet = @loai_duyet end

if $dmquyenct.NewValue <> $dmquyenct.OldValue insert into dmquyenct select * from @dmquyenct update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_quyen = @ma_quyen
delete dmquyenct where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_quyen = @ma_quyen
